title: tubella quitensis
intro: Tubella quitensis, also known as "False Unicorn Root," is a perennial plant native to North America, belonging to the Buttercup family (Ranunculaceae). The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include its anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and expectorant qualities. Tubella quitensis has been found to offer various health benefits, such as relieving menstrual cramps, calming coughs, and soothing digestive issues. The plant is often prepared as a tea or tincture, and it can also be dried and used in capsules or as a powder for its herbal remedies.
